name: AYTU BIOPHARMA, INC
summary: Aytu BioPharma, Inc. is a pharmaceutical company focused on innovative medicines for central nervous system diseases. It commercializes EXXUA (gepirone) for major depressive disorder, and ADHD products Adzenys XR-ODT and Cotempla XR-ODT, plus allergy/supplement products Karbinal ER, Poly-Vi-Flor, and Tri-Vi-Flor. The company licenses, acquires, develops, and commercializes novel prescription therapeutics, selling primarily through third-party wholesalers and pharmacies in the United States.

products.name: EXXUA (gepirone)
products.description: FDA-approved extended-release tablets, first-in-class selective serotonin 5HT1a receptor agonist for treatment of major depressive disorder in adults.

products.name: Adzenys XR-ODT (amphetamine)
products.description: Extended-release orally disintegrating tablets for treatment of ADHD.

products.name: Cotempla XR-ODT (methylphenidate)
products.description: Extended-release orally disintegrating tablets for treatment of ADHD.

products.name: Karbinal ER (carbinoxamine maleate)
products.description: Extended-release first-generation antihistamine oral suspension indicated to treat numerous allergic conditions.

products.name: Tri-Vi-Flor
products.description: Prescription fluoride-based supplement product line, complementary to Poly-Vi-Flor.

partnerships.description: Exclusive Commercialization Agreement entered June 2025 to commercialize EXXUA (gepirone) extended-release tablets in the United States.
